case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO vs. WOODBINE ALASKA FISH COMPANY et al

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - COMMERCIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO AS TO DEFENDANT WOODBINE ALASKA FISH COMPANY DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED
